TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tqwiy, title = Tqwiy, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tqwiy} }

S.FORM: alang Tqwiy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 184 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 167 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 2%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tqwiy hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tqwiy hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tqwiy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tqwiy hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tqwiy hya' ga Ngurus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tqwiy ga niya mki sku Toweng si atu Hosing Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 59 buwan, 184 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 167 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 17 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 88%, Amis 2%, Cou 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ru kyokay. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Tqwiy hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Tqwiy hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tqwiy hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Tqwiy hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Tqwiy hya' ga Ngurus. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tqwij ɣa nija mki s~ɕku toweŋ s~ɕi atu ħos~ɕiŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ru kjokaj. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tqwij ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na tqwij ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tqwij ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na tqwij ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tqwij ħjaʔ ɣa ŋurus~ɕ. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
